name: Utility Grid Partnership Program (open-source spec + per-utility annexes)
source_documents: colo/utility-partnership/ADC-UTIL-001_Rev0_1.md (Rev 0.1, 2026-06-11, program spec — issued pending Scott approval; decision 0008)
colo/utility-partnership/ADC-UTIL-001-C_LUS_Rev0_1.md (LUS annex; BRIC/muni fit, Marlie Hub opener)
telemetry_domain: Utility-facing surface of MGN-TEL-001: DNP3/IEC 61850 dispatch + POI protection telemetry per site TEL-PROFILE; drone inspection products delivered through the same plane; supervisory head-end at Mission Control Node 0 (Marlie Hub)

parameters.value: Four elements: 10 MW MGN-BOD-002 BTM block; dock-based drone inspection (host substation + area feeders/ROW); telemetry plane as grid services; federal funding alignment
Open-source: program spec public, same offer visible to all utilities; annexes are counterparty working drafts in the public repo

Vendor-neutral by design — spec fixes capability + interfaces only; owner/operator (ADC vs utility vs local operator) selected at each utility working session (UTIL-OI-03). No ops commitment exists yet.
Part 107 + waivers today; Part 108 (BVLOS) NPRM 2025-08-07, comments closed 2025-10-06, NOT final as of 2026-06-11 — coverage-radius claims gated by UTIL-OI-02

Verified 2026-06-11: GRIP $10.5B (SPARK round closed 2026-05-20, awards pending); Speed to Power active; LA 40101(d) ~$40M via LDENR (round-2 RFPs incl. microgrids); USDA New ERA ~90% obligated / PACE active (co-ops); FEMA BRIC reinstated, FY24-25 $1B NOFO closes 2026-07-23. Time-sensitive — refresh per UTIL-OI-01 before any presentation; never assert eligibility/award as fact.
First three: Entergy (Cameron Street, annex A), SLEMCO (annex B), LUS (annex C) — territories interlock around Lafayette (CAM-OI-03)
